# MileClear
> UK mileage tracking app for gig workers, delivery drivers, and self-employed professionals.

MileClear automatically records GPS trips, calculates HMRC mileage deductions (45p/mile for the first 10,000 miles, 25p after), and provides shift-based tracking with platform tagging for Uber, Deliveroo, Amazon Flex, Just Eat, Stuart, Gophr, DPD, Yodel, and Evri.

## Key Facts
- Platform: iOS (App Store)
- Price: Free tier with unlimited tracking. Pro at £4.99/month for exports, earnings tracking, and business intelligence.
- Target audience: UK gig economy workers, delivery drivers, private hire drivers, self-employed drivers, and personal drivers
- HMRC rates: Cars/vans 45p first 10,000 miles then 25p. Motorbikes 24p flat.
- UK tax year: 6 April to 5 April

## Features
- Automatic GPS trip recording with background drive detection
- Live Activities on iOS lock screen and Dynamic Island
- Business/personal trip classification with route learning
- Shift mode with per-platform earnings tracking (Uber, Deliveroo, Amazon Flex, etc.)
- HMRC tax deduction calculator
- PDF and CSV exports for Self Assessment
- Business expenses tracking with tax estimate
- UK fuel prices from 8,300+ government-mandated stations
- Saved locations with geofencing for auto-classification
- Weekly earnings goals and working calendar
- 43 achievements, streaks, and driving records
- Open Banking earnings sync via Plaid
- Offline-first with background sync

## Links
- Website: https://mileclear.com
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/mileclear/id6742044832
- Support: https://mileclear.com/support
